extension.description: Official repository for the Starfleet Kodi addon. Provides plugin.video.starfleet â€” TV Shows, Movies, Live TV, Sports, Free Streaming, Adult (PIN-protected), Radio.
extension.news: v1.0.2 - Add smrzips/unhingedthemes/animaniac/dobbelina dirs for ResolveURL + ResolveURL XXX v1.0.1 - Fix repository schema for Kodi 21 (Omega) v1.0.0 - Initial release

extension.summary: Starfleet â€” TV, Movies, Live TV, Sports, Radio, Adult
extension.description:
All-in-one Kodi plugin.
TV SHOWS â€” Browse, search and stream TV shows with full metadata, cast, episode stills, ratings and trailers powered by TMDB and TVDB.
MOVIES â€” Popular, top rated, now playing, browse by genre and search, powered by TMDB with full cast, director, backdrop and trailer support.
LIVE TV â€” Unified channel list from Samsung TV+, Plex FAST, Pluto TV, TVA (QuÃ©becor) and Global News (14 Canadian regions) via Google DAI. Channel logos loaded automatically. Source picker for duplicates. All sources fetched in parallel via ThreadPoolExecutor.
SPORTS â€” Live and upcoming events from istreameast.cx and crackstreams.mx. Categories: NFL, NBA, MLB, NHL, UFC, Boxing, Soccer, Formula 1, College Football, College Basketball, CFL, WWE/Wrestling. TheSportsDB and ESPN league logos, game times, LIVE indicator. Stream dialog with quality labels.
FREE STREAMING â€” Movies and TV shows from Popcornflix, Fawesome, Filmzie, Midnight Pulp, DistroTV, BounceTV, and Radial Entertainment. TMDB metadata, artwork and actor photos. Plays via debrid torrent pipeline (720p+).
ADULT â€” Full metadata from Adult Film Database (cast photos, studios, categories, ratings, director). Free streams from 5 sources (freeomovie.to, xxxmoviestream.org, watchpornfree.info, pornwatch.ws, speedporn.net) â€” deduplicated and merged by title. Source picker dialog. PIN protection.
DEBRID / TORRENTS â€” All movie and TV play buttons search YTS, The Pirate Bay, 1337x, and EZTV for 720p+ cached torrents. Instant availability checked on Real-Debrid, AllDebrid, Premiumize and TorBox. Quality shown in dialog labels (4K, 1080p, 720p, 3D). Nothing below 720p is ever shown.
RADIO â€” 90,000+ stations worldwide via Radio Browser. Navigate by country (with flag emoji), region/province/state, then city A-Z.
Fast loading: SQLite/Pickle binary cache, parallel threading, connection pooling, hot memory cache, reuselanguageinvoker. Compatible with Kodi 19 (Matrix), 20 (Nexus), 21 (Omega) and newer.
extension.news:
v1.6.1 - Fix YourBitTorrent crash (requests.utils has no quote_plus) - Fix torrent search timeout crash (as_completed TimeoutError now handled) - Add Tubi TV free stream search - Add Pluto TV VOD free stream search - Add Plex free on-demand search - Free sources now: Popcornflix, Archive, Tubi, Pluto, Plex (was 2)
v1.6.0 - Add Torrentio scraper (IMDB-based, most reliable for movies+TV) - Add YourBitTorrent scraper (yourbittorrent2.com) - Add Bitlord scraper (bitlordsearch.com) - Wire IMDB ID through movie/TV play path so Torrentio fires correctly - Total torrent sources: 10 (was 7)
v1.5.9 - Adult torrent search: skip 720p quality filter (adult content has no quality tags) - Adult torrent search: use TPB XXX category (500) instead of Movies - Fix zip install failure: forward slashes in zip entries
v1.5.8 - Fix all JS-embed hash URLs crashing player (player4me etc.) - Adult source picker now includes debrid/torrent streams (yellow) - Adult source picker now includes personal MixDrop/Streamtape sources - Fix artwork on adult film list (add User-Agent header for CDN images)
v1.5.7 - Fix image URLs leaking into film descriptions (og:description pollution) - Fix HTML entities in titles (& shows correctly now) - Add upns/lulustream/wolfstream/streamvid to embed resolver - Embed resolver: try API endpoints for hash-based (#fragment) embeds - Skip unresolvable JS embeds instead of crashing Kodi player - Fix breadcrumb: "Adult Movies" instead of "Free Streams"
v1.5.6 - Adult: flat Movies list (single entry showing all sources) - Adult: unified Search by title, performer, or scene type - Adult: trailers pulled from ADE, shown as first source option - Adult: debrid links added to adult play path (shown in yellow) - Adult: MixDrop Porn/Movies sub-folder search - Adult: fix truncated stream labels (full domain name now used)
v1.5.0 - Movies: New Releases shows films released in the last 30 days - Movies: List view shows cast/director/genre/runtime when detail cached - Adult: Box art extracted from HTML (fixes 404s), scene screenshots shown - Torrents: Added Bitsearch.to and TorrentGalaxy scrapers - Personal: MixDrop + Streamtape personal library search added as sources
v1.4.0 - Adult: site-specific title search (/?s=title) replaces page-1 catalog scan Films anywhere in site archives are now findable, not just most recent - Movies: added New Releases (upcoming) section powered by TMDB /movie/upcoming - Torrent search timeout reduced 20sâ†’8s for faster source picker response
v1.3.0 - Movies + TV: unified source picker (free streams + debrid/torrents in parallel) - Popcornflix + Archive.org title search added to source pipeline - Adult: ADE fallback metadata, parallel stream search, source picker dialog
v1.2.0 - Sports: Live/upcoming events from istreameast.cx + crackstreams.mx NFL, NBA, MLB, NHL, UFC, Boxing, Soccer, F1, CFB, NCAAB, CFL, WWE TheSportsDB/ESPN logos, game times, LIVE indicator, stream picker dialog - Free Streaming: Movies and TV from Popcornflix, Fawesome, Filmzie, Midnight Pulp, DistroTV, BounceTV, Radial Entertainment TMDB metadata + artwork, plays via debrid pipeline - Adult: 5 free stream sources (added watchpornfree.info, pornwatch.ws, speedporn.net). All sources merged by title, single entry per film. Source picker dialog: "Link 1 â€” Label, Link 2 â€” Label..." - Debrid/Torrents: 720p+ quality filter for all torrent sources. YTS (movies), TPB via apibay.org (movies+TV), 1337x (movies+TV), EZTV (TV shows). Quality shown in picker: "Debrid 1 (RD - Source 1080p)" - Kodi 20 (Nexus) + 21 (Omega) compatibility verified
v1.1.0 - Live TV: Added Global News (14 Canadian regions) via Google DAI - Live TV: Channel logos from Clearbit CDN for DAI channels - Adult: Free streams from freeomovie.to + xxxmoviestream.org, deduplicated - Adult: Full AFDB actor detail (measurements, height, eyes, hair, ethnicity) - Premium: Added TorBox resolver support - Settings: Cleaned up dead VOD settings, added TorBox configuration - Performance: All parallel ThreadPoolExecutor fetching for live sources
v1.0.0 - TV Shows: TMDB + TVDB metadata, seasons, episodes with stills - Movies: TMDB popular/top/new/genre/search with full cast - Live TV: Samsung TV+, Plex, Pluto TV, TVA+ (QuÃ©becor) with logos - Unified live channel list with multi-source picker dialog - Radio: 90,000+ stations, country flags, city-level browse - Adult: AFDB metadata, actor photos, studio and category browse - Premium resolvers: Real-Debrid, AllDebrid, Premiumize - PIN protection and hide toggle for Adult section - SQLite Pickle binary cache, ThreadPoolExecutor parallel fetching - reuselanguageinvoker for near-instant warm navigation
